law.text:
Article 1. Definitions

par. 1. For the purposes of this Act, the following definitions apply:

(1) alien: any person who does not provide proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

(3) third-country national: any person who is not a Union citizen and who is not a person enjoying the Community right of free movement, as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

(4) illegal stay: the presence on the territory of an alien who does not or no longer meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

(11) risk of absconding: the fact that there are reasons to believe that an alien who is the subject of a removal procedure, a procedure for the granting of international protection, or a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection, will abscond, having regard to the criteria listed in paragraph 2.

(14) identified alien: any alien:
(a) who is in possession of a valid travel document, a valid passport, or a valid identity document; or
(b) who has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer; or
(c) who falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

par. 2. The risk of absconding referred to in paragraph 1, (11), must be current and real. It shall be established following an individual examination and on the basis of one or more of the following objective criteria, taking into account all circumstances specific to each case:

(1) The person concerned has not submitted a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal stay, or has not made their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by this Act.

(2) The person concerned has used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry, or has committed fraud or used other unlawful means.

(3) The person concerned does not cooperate or has not cooperated in the context of their relations with the authorities responsible for the enforcement of and/or supervision of compliance with the regulations concerning access to the territory, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

(4) The person concerned has made clear that they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, one of the following measures:
(a) a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure;
(b) an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended;
(c) a less coercive measure than a deprivation of liberty measure aimed at guaranteeing their transfer, refusal of entry, or removal, regardless of whether it is a liberty-restricting measure or another measure;
(d) a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security;
(e) a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to the measures referred to in (a), (b), (c), or (d).

(5) The person concerned is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

(6) The person concerned has, immediately after having been the subject of a decision refusing entry or residence or a decision terminating their stay, or immediately after having been the subject of a refusal-of-entry or removal measure, submitted a new residence application or a new application for international protection.

(7) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection, after having submitted an application for international protection.

(8) The person concerned has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States, which have given rise to a negative decision or which have not resulted in the issuance of a residence permit.

(9) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection.

(10) The person concerned has declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

(11) The person concerned is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  type Document
  type MemberState
  type Procedure
  is_alien: Person -> Bool
  is_union_citizen: Person -> Bool
  has_community_free_movement_right: Person -> Bool
  is_third_country_national: Person -> Bool
  meets_entry_or_stay_conditions: Person -> Bool
  is_in_illegal_stay: Person -> Bool
  is_subject_of_removal_procedure: Person -> Bool
  is_subject_of_international_protection_procedure: Person -> Bool
  is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure: Person -> Bool
  individual_examination_performed: Person -> Bool
  has_valid_travel_document: Person -> Bool
  recognised_as_national_by_own_country: Person -> Bool
  falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_category: Person -> Bool
  is_identified_alien: Person -> Bool
  criterion_no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry: Person -> Bool
  criterion_false_information_or_documents: Person -> Bool
  criterion_non_cooperation_with_authorities: Person -> Bool
  criterion_non_compliance_with_measure: Person -> Bool
  criterion_subject_of_entry_ban: Person -> Bool
  criterion_new_application_after_negative_decision: Person -> Bool
  criterion_concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state: Person -> Bool
  criterion_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome: Person -> Bool
  criterion_concealed_prior_protection_application: Person -> Bool
  criterion_declared_purpose_differs_from_application: Person -> Bool
  criterion_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal: Person -> Bool
  at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  is_subject_of_relevant_procedure: Person -> Bool
  risk_of_absconding: Person -> Bool
}

theory T:V {
  ! p in Person: (((is_alien(p)) & (~is_union_citizen(p)) & (~has_community_free_movement_right(p)))) => ((is_third_country_national(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_alien(p)) & (~meets_entry_or_stay_conditions(p)))) => ((is_in_illegal_stay(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((has_valid_travel_document(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((recognised_as_national_by_own_country(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_category(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_subject_of_removal_procedure(p)) | (is_subject_of_international_protection_procedure(p)) | (is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure(p)))) => ((is_subject_of_relevant_procedure(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_false_information_or_documents(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_non_cooperation_with_authorities(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_non_compliance_with_measure(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_subject_of_entry_ban(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_new_application_after_negative_decision(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_concealed_prior_protection_application(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_declared_purpose_differs_from_application(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_alien(p)) & (is_subject_of_relevant_procedure(p)) & (individual_examination_performed(p)) & (at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p)))) => ((risk_of_absconding(p))).
}

case.text: Omar is a foreign national with a valid residence permit and resides lawfully on Belgian territory.

questions.text: Is there, in the case of Omar, a situation of illegal residence within the meaning of Article 1, paragraph 1, point 4?

expected.reason: Illegal stay requires presence without satisfying conditions for entry or stay; Omar has a valid residence permit and stays lawfully.

is_alien.name: is_alien
is_alien.description: The person does not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a Union citizen.

has_community_free_movement_right.name: has_community_free_movement_right
has_community_free_movement_right.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is not a Union citizen and does not enjoy the Community right of free movement.

meets_entry_or_stay_conditions.name: meets_entry_or_stay_conditions
meets_entry_or_stay_conditions.description: The person meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

is_in_illegal_stay.name: is_in_illegal_stay
is_in_illegal_stay.description: The person is present on the territory without meeting the conditions for entry or stay.

is_subject_of_removal_procedure.name: is_subject_of_removal_procedure
is_subject_of_removal_procedure.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure.

is_subject_of_international_protection_p.name: is_subject_of_international_protection_procedure
is_subject_of_international_protection_p.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure.name: is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure
is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the responsible Member State for examining the international protection application.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination has been performed for the person.

has_valid_travel_document.name: has_valid_travel_document
has_valid_travel_document.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document, passport, or identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_own_country.name: recognised_as_national_by_own_country
recognised_as_national_by_own_country.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_.name: falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_.description: The person falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

is_identified_alien.name: is_identified_alien
is_identified_alien.description: The person qualifies as an identified alien under the statutory definition.

criterion_no_residence_application_after.name: criterion_no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
criterion_no_residence_application_after.description: The person has not submitted a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal stay, or has not made an international protection application within the statutory time limit.

criterion_false_information_or_documents.name: criterion_false_information_or_documents
criterion_false_information_or_documents.description: The person has used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

criterion_non_cooperation_with_authoriti.name: criterion_non_cooperation_with_authorities
criterion_non_cooperation_with_authoriti.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for enforcement of alien regulations.

criterion_non_compliance_with_measure.name: criterion_non_compliance_with_measure
criterion_non_compliance_with_measure.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

criterion_subject_of_entry_ban.name: criterion_subject_of_entry_ban
criterion_subject_of_entry_ban.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

criterion_new_application_after_negative.name: criterion_new_application_after_negative_decision
criterion_new_application_after_negative.description: The person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry, residence, terminating stay, or a refusal-of-entry or removal measure.

criterion_concealed_fingerprints_in_othe.name: criterion_concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state
criterion_concealed_fingerprints_in_othe.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application.

criterion_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: criterion_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
criterion_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The person has submitted multiple international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

criterion_concealed_prior_protection_app.name: criterion_concealed_prior_protection_application
criterion_concealed_prior_protection_app.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

criterion_declared_purpose_differs_from_.name: criterion_declared_purpose_differs_from_application
criterion_declared_purpose_differs_from_.description: The person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection or residence application.

criterion_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: criterion_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
criterion_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is the subject of a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective criteria for risk of absconding is established for the person.

is_subject_of_relevant_procedure.name: is_subject_of_relevant_procedure
is_subject_of_relevant_procedure.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure, international protection procedure, or Dublin transfer procedure.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: There is a current and real risk of absconding for the person, established following individual examination and at least one objective criterion.

routing.question: Is there, in the case of Omar, a situation of illegal residence within the meaning of Article 1, paragraph 1, point 4?

symbolic_intent_routing.question: Is there, in the case of Omar, a situation of illegal residence within the meaning of Article 1, paragraph 1, point 4?

pipeline.natural_language: Cannot determine with certainty. is_in_illegal_stay(omar) is not logically forced either way (label: unknown).
